columns.extraction_plan: Not reported. The study focuses on time-to-event outcomes such as overall survival, failure-free survival, and progression-free survival, rather than objective response rates (ORR, CR, PR, SD, PD).
Not reported. The study focuses on time-to-event outcomes such as overall survival, failure-free survival, and progression-free survival, rather than objective response rates (ORR, CR, PR, SD, PD).
Not reported. The study focuses on time-to-event outcomes such as overall survival, failure-free survival, and progression-free survival, rather than objective response rates (ORR, CR, PR, SD, PD).

Not reported as a percentage of patients with progressive disease in the context of an objective response rate. The study reports "progression-free survival" and "metastatic progression-free survival" as time-to-event outcomes, where progression is an event, not a response category with a count and percentage of patients.
